summary: To verify Cheongpung's identity as a disciple of the Heavenly Gate, Sect Leader Ja-woon forces him into a sparring match. During the fight, Cheongpung demonstrates formidable skill by using the Heavenly Realm Explosion, which convinces the Sect Leader of his legitimacy and mastery. Following the match, the revelation of a broken sword artifact leads Cheongpung to realize he possesses the missing handle, successfully completing an epic weapon quest.
key_moments: Sect Leader Ja-woon forces Cheongpung into a spar to verify his identity.
Cheongpung showcases his power by using the Heavenly Realm Explosion technique.
Cheongpung identifies the broken sword fragment and realizes he possesses the matching handle, completing the quest.
